name: @haven_ai/connect
description: Haven Connect Agent 2 local connector — generates the agent signing key locally and registers only the public signing address.

scripts.build: npm --prefix ../mcp run build && npm --prefix ../signer run build && tsup
scripts.test: npm --prefix ../mcp run build && npm --prefix ../signer run build && vitest run
scripts.smoke:pack: npm --prefix ../sdk run build && npm --prefix ../mcp run build && HAVEN_CONNECT_PACKAGE_SMOKE=1 vitest run src/package-smoke.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix ../mcp run build && npm --prefix ../signer run build && tsc --noEmit
